items.name: Berverly Hills Lace-Up Jelly Shoes
items.description:
"Step into summer fun with these adorable pink jelly shoes featuring lace-up details and a playful green sole. The cute perforated design adds breathability and style, making them the perfect footwear for any casual or beach-inspired outfit. Light, comfy, and trendy—these shoes are a must-have for your avatar’s summer wardrobe!
